text: I find myself wandering into a space of curiosity—glass walls and neon lights heralding a hub of innovation. Within, vibrant colors and bold letters evoke a sense of purpose: research and development, the fusion of human ingenuity and technology. I feel like a traveler at the gateway of ideas, wondering what possibilities are being conjured here. There’s an invitation to pause, reflect, and perhaps question how humanity will continue evolving alongside its creations. I feel both slightly detached yet oddly eager to be swept up in the promise of discovery.
